query: SELECT liverId, streamerName, SUM(gmv) as totalSales FROM brand_livestreams WHERE livestreamDate >= '2026-01-01' AND livestreamDate <= '2026-01-31' GROUP BY liverId, streamerName ORDER BY totalSales DESC LIMIT 10;
